mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dorm_room WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM dorm_room WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY room_no ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dorm_room (room_no, building_id, floor_num, bed_total, room_type, remark) VALUES (#{roomNo}, #{buildingId}, #{floorNum}, #{bedTotal}, #{roomType}, #{remark})
mapper.update:
UPDATE dorm_room
room_no = #{roomNo}, building_id = #{buildingId}, floor_num = #{floorNum}, bed_total = #{bedTotal}, room_type = #{roomType}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dorm_bed WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM dorm_room WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND room_no = #{roomNo} AND is_deleted = 0
